title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council Resolution No. 2025-13, dated November 17, 2025 entitled "Resolution reprogramming a portion of the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund Current Appropriation - Quick Response Fund CY 2025 amounting to Two Million Five Hundred Fifty Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (Php 2,550,000.00) for various purposes and approving the same as Supplemental Investment Plan.
